---
applyTo: "aidlc-docs/**,docs/**,*.requirements.md,*.stories.md"
---

# AI-DLC Inception Phase Instructions

When working on requirements, user stories, or architecture documents:

- Produce structured artifacts in aidlc-docs/inception/
- Requirements: functional, non-functional, constraints, acceptance criteria
- User stories: "As a [role], I want [feature] so that [benefit]" with Given/When/Then
- Architecture: component boundaries, data flows, and ADRs
- Risk: complexity assessment and blocker identification before construction
